paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)**, combining **Math Evol-Instruct** (downward/upward evolution of math problems) with **Instruction Reward Model (IRM)** and **Process-supervised Reward Model (PRM)** to improve mathematical reasoning without external Python tools
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical reasoning, problem-solving, chain-of-thought prompting, instruction-following for math tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (derived from open-source base models but not explicitly licensed in the paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities of LLMs across grade-to-high-school difficulty levels
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)
raw_extraction.extension: **Process-supervised Reward Model (PRM)** mitigates false positives in problem-solving by evaluating correctness of intermediate reasoning steps using GPT-4 annotations
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)**, combining **Math Evol-Instruct** (downward/upward evolution of math problems) with **Instruction Reward Model (IRM)** and **Process-supervised Reward Model (PRM)** to improve mathematical reasoning without external Python tools
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical reasoning, problem-solving, chain-of-thought prompting, instruction-following for math tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (derived from open-source base models but not explicitly licensed in the paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities of LLMs across grade-to-high-school difficulty levels
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)
raw_extraction.extension: **Process-supervised Reward Model (PRM)** mitigates false positives in problem-solving by evaluating correctness of intermediate reasoning steps using GPT-4 annotations
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)**, combining **Math Evol-Instruct** (downward/upward evolution of math problems) with **Instruction Reward Model (IRM)** and **Process-supervised Reward Model (PRM)** to improve mathematical reasoning without external Python tools. Outperforms GPT-4 early versions and proprietary models like GPT-3.5 Turbo on GSM8k and MATH benchmarks
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical reasoning, problem-solving, chain-of-thought prompting, instruction-following for math tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (derived from open-source base models but not explicitly licensed in the paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities of LLMs across grade-to-high-school difficulty levels
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)
raw_extraction.extension: **Process-supervised Reward Model (PRM)** mitigates false positives in problem-solving by evaluating correctness of intermediate reasoning steps using GPT-4 annotations
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforced Learning for Evol-Instruct Fine-tuning (RLEIF)**, combining evolutionary instruction tuning with process supervision via **Process Reward Modeling (PRM)** and **Instruction Reward Modeling (IRM)** to enhance mathematical reasoning
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical reasoning, problem-solving, educational applications, and benchmarks like GSM8K and MATH
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities of LLMs across grade-to-high school problems using reinforcement learning and instruction evolution
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforced Evolutionary Instruction Fine-Tuning (Evol-Instruct) + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instruction Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.extension: **Evol-Instruct** enables iterative refinement of instruction datasets through downward and upward evolution, improving generalization across problem difficulty levels
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Combines **Evol-Instruct** with **PRM** and **IRM** to achieve state-of-the-art performance on GSM8K and MATH benchmarks, demonstrating scalability across different base models
raw_extraction.application: Advanced mathematical problem-solving, educational applications, and benchmark evaluations
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable enhancement of mathematical reasoning in LLMs via reinforcement learning and instruction evolution
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforced Evolutionary Instruction Fine-Tuning (Evol-Instruct) + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instruction Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.extension: **Step-by-step Process Reward Modeling (PRM)** provides precise supervision for intermediate reasoning steps, outperforming traditional verifiers like Self-Consistency and ORM
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Achieves **69.5% improvement on GSM8K** and **41.0% on MATH** over baselines, showcasing the effectiveness of **Evol-Instruct** and **PRM** on smaller models
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical education, problem-solving, and benchmark evaluations
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving mathematical reasoning in smaller-scale LLMs via reinforcement learning and instruction evolution
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforced Evolutionary Instruction Fine-Tuning (Evol-Instruct) + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instruction Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.extension: **Evol-Instruct** combined with **PRM** enhances reasoning accuracy even in smaller models, bridging the performance gap between proprietary and open-source models
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Delivers **10.5% improvement on GSM8K** and **32.0% on MATH** over MetaMath-Llama2-70B, demonstrating superior performance at scale
raw_extraction.application: Advanced mathematical problem-solving, educational applications, and benchmark evaluations
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable improvements in mathematical reasoning for medium-sized LLMs via reinforcement learning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforced Evolutionary Instruction Fine-Tuning (Evol-Instruct) + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instruction Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.extension: **Evol-Instruct** and **PRM** improve generalization across problem types, including challenging topics like Intermediate Algebra and Geometry
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.organization: Unknown (authors affiliated with various institutions, no single canonical org)
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforced Evol-Instruct**, a novel iterative self-improvement framework combining evolutionary algorithms and reinforcement learning to enhance mathematical reasoning capabilities through human feedback loops.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Null (primarily instruction tuning on math-related datasets)
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical problem-solving, code generation, logical reasoning, and step-by-step explanation generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling mathematical reasoning in LLMs via iterative refinement using human feedback
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforced Evol-Instruct (iterative self-improvement via human feedback)
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.organization: Unknown (authors affiliated with various institutions, no clear single org)
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Evol-Instruct**, a method where instructions are iteratively evolved using human feedback to increase complexity and difficulty, paired with reinforcement learning to improve mathematical reasoning in LLMs. The paper emphasizes evolving instructions upward/downward in complexity to generate high-quality math problems and solutions.
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical problem solving, instruction generation for education, automated curriculum design, and improving LLM performance on STEM-related tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning abilities in large language models through instruction evolution and reinforcement learning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) combined with Evol-Instruct (instruction evolution via human feedback)
raw_extraction.extension: Reinforced Evol-Instruct framework combines iterative instruction evolution with RLHF to enhance mathematical reasoning capabilities.
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Application of **Instruction Quality Scoring Reward Model (IRM)** and **Process Supervised Reward Model (PRM)** during RL training for enhanced mathematical reasoning, leveraging **Evol-Instruct** synthetic data pipeline
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical problem-solving (GSM8K, MATH benchmarks), instruction-following, and out-of-distribution math problems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities of LLMs through RLHF-inspired techniques and synthetic instruction tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling (likely inherited from base model)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning (RL) with Instruction Quality Scoring Reward Model (IRM) and Process Supervised Reward Model (PRM)
raw_extraction.extension: **Downward evolution** of instructions improves model performance by 14.8% on GSM8K and 19.6% on MATH when applied iteratively
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Integration of **IRM and PRM** into RL training pipeline for improved generalization across mathematical tasks, utilizing **Evol-Instruct**-generated synthetic data
raw_extraction.application: Mathematics problem-solving, instruction-following, and domain-specific reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable mathematical reasoning via RLHF-inspired methods and synthetic instruction tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling (inherited from base model)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning (RL) with IRM and PRM
raw_extraction.extension: **Step-level AI annotation** for PRM training data reduces manual effort while maintaining performance gains
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Adoption of **Evol-Instruct** methodology for generating high-quality synthetic instruction data, paired with **IRM/PRM** for RL optimization
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical problem-solving, educational applications, and automated reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving mathematical reasoning in smaller models via scalable synthetic instruction tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling (inherited from base model)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning (RL) with IRM and PRM
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: End-to-end **fully AI-generated synthetic data pipeline**, including **Evol-Instruct** and **step-level PRM annotations**, for cost-efficient RL training
raw_extraction.application: Advanced mathematics problem-solving, automated theorem proving, and STEM education
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable mathematical reasoning in medium-sized models via synthetic instruction tuning

raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning (RL) with IRM and PRM
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: **Evol-Instruct** synthetic data pipeline combined with **IRM/PRM** enables superior performance on complex mathematical tasks, surpassing specialized baselines like DART-Math
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical problem-solving, scientific reasoning, and automated proof verification
